channel.title: Retro on John Westbroek
channel.description: Recent content in Retro on John Westbroek

item.title: Super Nintendo
item.description: Console Super NES (PAL) Control Deck SNSP-001A (FRG) HOL My original console from 1992 Controller 8BitDo SN30 2.4g wireless gamepad - SF edition Accessories CoolNovelties.co.uk —Sync over Luma RGB Scart Cable A brand-new RGB scart lead. Custom made with 2 metres of screened flexible video cable - featuring SYNC over Luma for improved image quality. Link Games Label Title Genre Year Dev - Pub SNSP Set Aladdin, Disney's Action/ Platform 1993 Capcom RJ-EUR C Alien 3 Action/ Shooter 1993 Probe Software -

item.title: Televisions
item.description: Bang & Olufsen Beovision MX 4000 The Beovision range of 4:3 standard definition CRT TVs are in my opinion some of the very best for retro gaming. Featuring 2 x RGB Scart inputs, active stereo sound, great picture quality, de-interlacing function, full service menu adjustments and of course the iconic Danish design. Service Mode To enter service mode press MENU, 1, 1, GO. For anyone trying to get the service menu on an MX4200 the code is MENU, 0, 0, GO (not 1,1 as used on other sets).
